sprint.goal: Fix content accuracy, publish Go kernel story, advance v3.0 marketing gate

blockers.description: Governance catch-22 blocks all content agents — pnpm install blocked by hook before kernel exists. 4th consecutive cycle with zero agent output.

contentAccuracyFlags.description: Weekly content pack claims Codex CLI and Gemini CLI support — false. Only claude-code and copilot-cli adapters exist. OpenCode PR #1109 is open, not merged.
